context_text: <B> how much your friendship is worth and and really i mean it's funny that they they pose this question because most people wouldn't would you know if you think about it if someone said well how much would someone have to pay you in order to not speak to your friend again if they worded it that way / <A> mhm / <B> you would say well of course i'm not gonna do that you know / <A> wow / <B> um so of course i don't know they'd they have to word it exactly right in order to get people to participate in the study you know / <A> hm
